member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.AuthClient
member.summary: Handles authentication against the Chiptuning.Ai API. Tokens are managed automatically by — you only need to call once per session.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.AuthClient.LoginAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates with the API and stores the resulting tokens for all subsequent requests.
member.returns: The token response including access token, refresh token, and expiry.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.AuthClient.RefreshAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exchanges the current refresh token for a new access token. Called automatically when a request returns HTTP 401.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.AuthClient.LogoutAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Revokes the current session.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.AuthClient.GetProfileAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the authenticated user's profile and plan details.

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.TokenResponse
member.summary: Returned after a successful login or token refresh.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.TokenResponse.TokenField
member.summary: Primary token field name used by some API versions.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.TokenResponse.AccessTokenField
member.summary: Alternate camelCase spelling some API versions use.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.TokenResponse.AccessTokenSnakeField
member.summary: Alternate snake_case spelling some API versions use.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.TokenResponse.Token
member.summary: JWT access token, resolved from whichever field the server sent.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.TokenResponse.RefreshToken
member.summary: Opaque refresh token used to obtain a new access token without re-entering credentials.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.TokenResponse.ExpiresIn
member.summary: Number of seconds until the access token expires.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.TokenResponse.ExtraFields
member.summary: Captures any extra fields so we can show them in diagnostics if the token is missing.

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.UserProfile
member.summary: Authenticated user profile returned by GET /api/auth/me.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.UserProfile.Id
member.summary: Unique user identifier.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.UserProfile.Email
member.summary: Account email address.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.UserProfile.Tier
member.summary: Subscription tier (e.g. Basic, Premium).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.UserProfile.StorageUsedBytes
member.summary: Total storage consumed in bytes.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Auth.UserProfile.StorageLimitBytes
member.summary: Storage allowance for the current tier in bytes.

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.ChiptuningAiClient
member.summary: Main entry point for the Chiptuning.Ai API.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.ChiptuningAiClient.AccessToken
member.summary: Current access token, or null if not authenticated.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.ChiptuningAiClient.RefreshToken
member.summary: Current refresh token, or null if not authenticated.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.ChiptuningAiClient.TokenExpiresAt
member.summary: UTC time when the current access token expires, or null if unknown.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.ChiptuningAiClient.Auth
member.summary: Authentication operations — login, refresh, logout, profile.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.ChiptuningAiClient.Files
member.summary: File upload and management operations.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.ChiptuningAiClient.Patches
member.summary: Patch creation, application, and history operations.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.ChiptuningAiClient.Lookups
member.summary: Autocomplete lookup values — vehicle classes, ECU makes/models, etc.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.ChiptuningAiClient.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new Chiptuning.Ai client.
member.param: Base URL of the API. Defaults to https://chiptuning-api.azurewebsites.net. Override for self-hosted or staging environments.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.ChiptuningAiClient.FromToken(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a client pre-loaded with an existing access token. Use this if you store tokens between sessions.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.ChiptuningAiClient.FromToken(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset})
member.summary: Creates a client pre-loaded with an existing access token and a known expiry time. Use this when restoring a persisted session so the refresh timer schedules correctly.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.ChiptuningAiClient.GetBinaryAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: GETs a resource and returns the raw response bytes (for binary file downloads). Throws if the server returns a non-success status.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.ChiptuningAiClient.PostFormBinaryAsync(System.String,System.Net.Http.MultipartFormDataContent,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: POSTs multipart form data and returns the raw response bytes (for binary file downloads). Throws if the server returns a non-success status.

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Common.ApiException
member.summary: Thrown when the Chiptuning.Ai API returns a non-success response. Check for the machine-readable reason.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Common.ApiException.ErrorCode
member.summary: Machine-readable error code returned by the API (e.g. FILE_NOT_FOUND).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Common.ApiException.StatusCode
member.summary: HTTP status code of the failed response.

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Common.DailyLimitExceededException
member.summary: Thrown when POST /api/patches/apply returns HTTP 429 because the account's daily patch-apply quota has been exhausted.

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Common.ApiResponse`1
member.summary: Represents the standard JSON envelope returned by every Chiptuning.Ai API endpoint.

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Common.PagedResult`1
member.summary: Paged result wrapper returned by list endpoints.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Common.PagedResult`1.Items
member.summary: Items in the current page.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Common.PagedResult`1.Total
member.summary: Total number of records matching the query.

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata
member.summary: Metadata describing the vehicle and controller for an ECU file upload. Required fields must be provided; optional fields can be left null.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata.VehicleClass
member.summary: Vehicle class (e.g. Passenger Car, Truck). Required.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata.VehicleMake
member.summary: Vehicle manufacturer (e.g. BMW). Required.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata.VehicleModel
member.summary: Vehicle model (e.g. 3 Series). Required.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata.VehicleVariant
member.summary: Vehicle variant (e.g. 320i). Required.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata.EngineType
member.summary: Fuel type: Petrol or Diesel. Required.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata.ECUType
member.summary: Controller type: ECU, TCU, or CPC. Required.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata.ECUMake
member.summary: Controller manufacturer (e.g. Bosch). Required.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata.ECUModel
member.summary: Controller model (e.g. EDC17C64). Required.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata.ReadHardware
member.summary: Tool used to read the controller (e.g. CMD Flash, Alientech KESS3). Required.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata.ReadMode
member.summary: Read method: OBD, Bench, or Boot. Required.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata.ControllerHWNumber
member.summary: Controller hardware number (optional).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata.ControllerSWNumber
member.summary: Controller software number (optional).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata.EngineCode
member.summary: Engine code (e.g. N57D30). Optional.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata.VIN
member.summary: Vehicle identification number. Optional.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata.PowerOutput
member.summary: Stock power output in kW. Optional.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata.TorqueOutput
member.summary: Stock torque output in Nm. Optional.

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileUploadResult
member.summary: Result returned after a successful file upload.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileUploadResult.FileId
member.summary: Unique identifier for the uploaded file. Store this to create patches later.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileUploadResult.FileName
member.summary: Original file name.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileUploadResult.FileSize
member.summary: File size in bytes.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileUploadResult.Hash
member.summary: SHA-256 hash of the file content.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileUploadResult.MD5
member.summary: MD5 hash of the file content.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileUploadResult.IsDuplicate
member.summary: True if this file was already uploaded previously. The existing record is returned instead of creating a duplicate.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileUploadResult.UploadedAt
member.summary: Date and time the file was uploaded (UTC).

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails
member.summary: Detailed file information returned by get and list endpoints.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.FileId
member.summary: Unique file identifier.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.FileName
member.summary: Original file name.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.FileSize
member.summary: File size in bytes.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.Hash
member.summary: SHA-256 hash.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.MD5
member.summary: MD5 hash.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.VehicleClass
member.summary: Vehicle class.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.VehicleMake
member.summary: Vehicle manufacturer.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.VehicleModel
member.summary: Vehicle model.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.VehicleVariant
member.summary: Vehicle variant.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.EngineType
member.summary: Fuel type.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.ECUType
member.summary: Controller type (ECU/TCU/CPC).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.ECUMake
member.summary: Controller manufacturer.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.ECUModel
member.summary: Controller model.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.ReadHardware
member.summary: Read hardware tool.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.ReadMode
member.summary: Read mode (OBD/Bench/Boot).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.ControllerHWNumber
member.summary: Controller hardware number.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.ControllerSWNumber
member.summary: Controller software number.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.EngineCode
member.summary: Engine code.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.VIN
member.summary: Vehicle identification number.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.PowerOutput
member.summary: Stock power output in kW.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.TorqueOutput
member.summary: Stock torque output in Nm.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.PatchCount
member.summary: Number of patches created against this file.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.UploadedAt
member.summary: Date and time the file was uploaded (UTC).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.UploadedBy
member.summary: User ID of the uploader.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.UploadedByEmail
member.summary: Email address of the uploader (populated on detail fetch only).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.ChunkHashes
member.summary: MD5 chunk hashes used for similarity matching (populated on detail fetch only).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileDetails.IsOwner
member.summary: True when the authenticated caller owns this file.

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.UpdateFileRequest
member.summary: Editable metadata fields for an existing file.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.UpdateFileRequest.VehicleClass
member.summary: Vehicle class (e.g. Car, Truck).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.UpdateFileRequest.VehicleMake
member.summary: Vehicle manufacturer (e.g. BMW, Volkswagen).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.UpdateFileRequest.VehicleModel
member.summary: Vehicle model (e.g. 3 Series, Golf).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.UpdateFileRequest.VehicleVariant
member.summary: Vehicle variant or trim level.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.UpdateFileRequest.EngineType
member.summary: Engine type or displacement (e.g. 2.0 TDI).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.UpdateFileRequest.ECUType
member.summary: ECU type or family (e.g. EDC17).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.UpdateFileRequest.ECUMake
member.summary: ECU manufacturer.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.UpdateFileRequest.ECUModel
member.summary: ECU model or part number.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.UpdateFileRequest.ReadHardware
member.summary: Hardware tool used to read the ECU (e.g. Alientech KESS3).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.UpdateFileRequest.ReadMode
member.summary: Read method used (e.g. OBD, Boot).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.UpdateFileRequest.ControllerHWNumber
member.summary: Controller hardware version number (optional).

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.UpdateFileRequest.ControllerSWNumber
member.summary: Controller software version number (optional).

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.SimilarFile
member.summary: A file match returned by the similarity search endpoint.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.SimilarFile.FileId
member.summary: File identifier of the matched parent file.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.SimilarFile.FileName
member.summary: File name.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.SimilarFile.JaccardScore
member.summary: Jaccard similarity score between 0.0 and 1.0.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.SimilarFile.MatchPercentage
member.summary: Human-readable match percentage (e.g. "87.5%").

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FilesClient
member.summary: Operations for uploading and managing ECU files. Access via .

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FilesClient.UploadAsync(System.String,ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FileMetadata,System.IProgress{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads an ECU file. Automatically uses chunked upload for files larger than 20 MB.
member.param: Full path to the ECU file on disk.
Vehicle and controller metadata to associate with the file.
Optional progress callback. Receives a value from 0 to 100 during chunked uploads. Not reported for single uploads.
member.returns: The uploaded file result including the needed to create patches.
member.exception: Thrown if the file does not exist at .
Thrown if the API rejects the upload.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FilesClient.GetAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves details for a specific file by ID.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FilesClient.GetByHashAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Looks up a file by its MD5 hash (exact match). Returns null if not found.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FilesClient.ListAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists files filtered by controller make and model.
member.param: Controller manufacturer to filter by (e.g. Bosch).
Controller model to filter by (e.g. EDC17C64).
Number of records to skip (for pagination).
Number of records to return. Maximum 100.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FilesClient.FindSimilarAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Finds files similar to the provided ECU file using Jaccard similarity on 4 KB MD5 chunks. Useful for finding tuned versions of the same base file.
member.param: Path to the file to compare against.
Limit search to this controller manufacturer. Omitted when null or empty.
Limit search to this controller model. Omitted when null or empty.
member.returns: List of similar files ordered by descending similarity score.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FilesClient.DownloadAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads the original ECU binary for a file and returns its raw bytes.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FilesClient.UpdateAsync(System.Guid,ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.UpdateFileRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates editable metadata for a file (vehicle, ECU, read info).

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Files.FilesClient.DeleteAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft-deletes a file. The file is hidden immediately and permanently purged after 30 days.

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Lookups.LookupsClient
member.summary: Retrieves autocomplete lookup values. No authentication required by the server, but the standard auth header is sent when a token is available. Access via .

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Lookups.LookupsClient.GetAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all active values for the given lookup type. Valid types: VehicleClass, VehicleMake, VehicleModel, EngineType, ECUType, ECUMake, ECUModel, ReadHardware, ReadMode.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Lookups.LookupsClient.GetCascadeAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns distinct field values from actual uploaded files, filtered by parent field selections. Use this to implement cascade dropdowns. Supported fields: VehicleMake, VehicleModel, VehicleVariant, ECUMake, ECUModel.

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchesClient
member.summary: Operations for creating and applying ECU patches. Access via .

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchesClient.UploadAsync(System.String,System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads a modified ECU file to generate a binary patch against its original parent.
member.param: Path to the tuned/modified ECU file. The API computes the binary diff between this file and the original identified by .
File ID of the original (unmodified) ECU file. Must have been uploaded with first.
Optional human-readable description of the changes (e.g. Stage 1 — +30 hp).
member.exception: Thrown if the modified file does not exist.
Thrown if the API rejects the request.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchesClient.ApplyAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Applies a patch to a source ECU file and returns the patched output file. Each application counts against your daily plan quota.
member.param: The source ECU file to apply the patch to.
member.exception: Thrown when the account's daily patch-apply quota has been exhausted.
Thrown if the API rejects the request.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchesClient.ListAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all patches created against a specific parent file.
member.param: The parent file ID to list patches for.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchesClient.GetAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns details for a specific patch.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchesClient.GetHistoryAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the patch application history for a file — every time a patch was applied to it.
member.param: The file to get history for.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchesClient.UpdateAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates the description and/or version label of an existing patch.
member.param: New description, or null to clear.
New version label, or null to clear.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchesClient.DeleteAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Permanently deletes a patch.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchesClient.ProcessAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Guid},System.Boolean,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Applies multiple patches to a raw ECU file and returns the processed binary. Patches may come from different parent files; they are applied in the order given. The file is not stored — the result is streamed back directly.
member.param: Path to the raw ECU binary to process.
Ordered list of patch IDs to apply (sort by similarity before calling).
Skip the integrity check against the base file.
Optional reason logged server-side when bypassing.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchesClient.DetectAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Detects which patches for a parent file are already applied, not applied, or conflicted in the supplied ECU binary. Returns one result per active patch with metadata and state.
member.param: Parent file whose patches to check against.
Path to the ECU binary to inspect.

member.name: M:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchesClient.GenerateAsync(System.String,System.Guid,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchClientAction},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Applies, removes, or skips patches on a source ECU file per explicit per-patch actions. Apply writes the solution bytes; Remove restores the original master bytes back. The result binary is returned directly — not stored server-side.
member.param: Parent file the patches belong to (used for audit).
Per-patch actions. Patches with action Skip are no-ops.

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchUploadResult
member.summary: Result returned after a patch is created.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchUploadResult.PatchId
member.summary: Unique patch identifier. Store this to apply the patch to other files.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchUploadResult.FileSize
member.summary: Patch file size in bytes.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchUploadResult.Description
member.summary: Human-readable description of the patch changes.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchUploadResult.Version
member.summary: Version label (e.g. v1.2).

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchDetails
member.summary: Detailed patch information.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchDetails.PatchId
member.summary: Unique patch identifier.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchDetails.Description
member.summary: Description of the changes in this patch.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchDetails.Version
member.summary: Version label.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchDetails.FileSize
member.summary: Patch file size in bytes.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchDetails.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the patch is currently active.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchDetails.CreatedAt
member.summary: Date and time the patch was created (UTC).

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.ApplyPatchResult
member.summary: Result returned after successfully applying a patch.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.ApplyPatchResult.ResultFileId
member.summary: File ID of the patched output file.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.ApplyPatchResult.AppliedAt
member.summary: Date and time the patch was applied (UTC).

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchHistoryEntry
member.summary: A single entry in a file's patch application history.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchHistoryEntry.PatchId
member.summary: The patch that was applied.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchHistoryEntry.ResultFileId
member.summary: The output file produced.

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchHistoryEntry.AppliedAt
member.summary: When the patch was applied (UTC).

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchDetectionResult
member.summary: Detection result for one patch against a user-supplied ECU file. Returned by .

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchDetectionResult.State
member.summary: "Applied", "NotApplied", or "Conflict"

member.name: T:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchClientAction
member.summary: Per-patch action for .

member.name: P:ChiptuningAi.Client.Patches.PatchClientAction.Action
member.summary: "Apply", "Remove", or "Skip"
